mapper.select: SELECT MST.MTSEQ AS TRACE_SEQ, A.NIP_HOST_MST_SEQ AS NIP_HOST_MST_SEQ, MST.MTIP AS SIP_BLOCK, MST.MTASNUM AS SASORG_CD, B.SASORG_NM AS SASORG_NM, DECODE(A.SRSSOFFICESCODE,'',E.ssvc_obj_cd,null,E.ssvc_obj_cd,A.SRSSOFFICESCODE) AS SLVL_CD, DECODE(C.SLVL_NM,'',F.SLVL_NM,null,F.SLVL_NM,C.SLVL_NM) AS SLVL_NM, A.SIP_IF_NM AS SIP_HOST_NM, A.SIP_HOST_NM AS SIP_IF_NM FROM ( SELECT MTSEQ , MTIP, MTASNUM FROM( SELECT M1.SEQ AS MTSEQ, M1.TIP AS MTIP, M2.ASNUM AS MTASNUM FROM (SELECT ROWNUM AS SEQ, TRIM(UNNEST(STRING_TO_ARRAY(#{sipaddresslist, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'|'))) AS TIP FROM DUAL ) M1, (SELECT ROWNUM AS SEQ, TRIM(UNNEST(STRING_TO_ARRAY(#{sasOrgCdList, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'|'))) AS ASNUM FROM DUAL ) M2 WHERE M1.SEQ = M2.SEQ ) ) MST ,MST.TB_IP_HOST_MST A ,MST.TB_IP_ASORG_BAS B ,MST.TB_LVL_CD C ,mst.TB_IP_ASSIGN_MST D ,mst.tb_lvl_mst E ,mst.TB_LVL_CD F WHERE 1=1 AND A.sprority_yn(+) ='Y' AND A.SIP_HOST_TYPE_CD(+) ='HT0110' AND MST.MTIP = A.SIP_BLOCK(+) AND MST.MTASNUM = B.SASORG_CD(+) AND A.SRSSOFFICESCODE = C.SLVL_CD(+) AND (INET( DECODE(MST.MTIP,'','0.0.0.0/0',NULL,'0.0.0.0/0', MST.MTIP)) <<= D.pip_prefix(+) AND D.sip_create_type_cd(+) ='CT0001') AND D.nlvl_mst_seq = E.nlvl_mst_seq(+) AND D.ssvc_line_type_cd = E.ssvc_line_type_cd(+) AND E.ssvc_obj_cd = F.slvl_cd(+) ORDER BY MST.MTSEQ

SELECT A.NIP_HOST_MST_SEQ AS NIP_HOST_MST_SEQ, A.SIP_BLOCK AS SIP_BLOCK, A.SIP_HOST_TYPE_CD AS SIP_HOST_TYPE_CD, C.SIP_HOST_TYPE_NM AS SIP_HOST_TYPE_NM, A.SRSSOFFICESCODE AS SRSSOFFICESCODE, D.SLVL_NM AS SRSSOFFICESNM, A.SIP_IF_NM AS SIP_HOST_NM, A.SIP_HOST_NM AS SIP_IF_NM, H.SSVC_MGROUP_NM||H.SSVC_MGROUP_NM1 AS SSVC_MGROUP_NM, E.SIPMS_SVC_NM AS SIPMS_SVC_NM, F.SASSIGN_TYPE_NM AS SASSIGN_TYPE_NM, G.SSVC_USE_TYPE_NM AS SSVC_USE_TYPE_NM, A.SLLNUM AS SLLNUM, A.SSAID AS SSAID, A.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD AS SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD, A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ AS NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ FROM MST.TB_IP_HOST_MST A, MST.TB_IP_ASSIGN_MST B, MST.TB_IP_HOST_TYPE_CD C, MST.TB_LVL_CD D, MST.TB_IPMS_SVC_MST E, MST.TB_ASSIGN_TYPE_CD F, MST.TB_SVC_USE_TYPE_CD G, MST.TB_SVC_MGROUP_CD H
WHERE 1=1 AND NIP_HOST_MST_SEQ=#{nipHostMstSeq, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ=B.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ(+) AND B.NIPMS_SVC_SEQ=E.NIPMS_SVC_SEQ(+) AND A.SIP_HOST_TYPE_CD=C.SIP_HOST_TYPE_CD(+) AND A.SRSSOFFICESCODE=D.SLVL_CD(+) AND B.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD=F.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD(+) AND E.SSVC_USE_TYPE_CD=G.SSVC_USE_TYPE_CD(+) AND E.SSVC_HGROUP_CD=H.SSVC_HGROUP_CD AND E.SSVC_MGROUP_CD=H.SSVC_MGROUP_CD

SELECT A.NIP_HOST_MST_SEQ AS NIP_HOST_MST_SEQ, B.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ AS NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ, B.SFIRST_ADDR AS SFIRST_ADDR, B.SLAST_ADDR AS SLAST_ADDR, B.NBITMASK AS NBITMASK, B.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD AS SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD, C.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_NM AS SIP_CREATE_TYPE_NM, B.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD AS SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD, D.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM AS SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM, B.SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD AS SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD, E.SASSIGN_LEVEL_NM AS SASSIGN_LEVEL_NM, CASE WHEN B.NPRIORITY > 5 THEN '감사대상'::VARCHAR(10) ELSE '정상'::VARCHAR(10) END AS VALIDATIONCHECK_NM, F.SSVC_GROUP_CD AS SSVC_GROUP_CD, G.SLVL_NM AS SSVC_GROUP_NM, F.SSVC_OBJ_CD AS SSVC_OBJ_CD, H.SLVL_NM AS SSVC_OBJ_NM, I.SICISOFFICESCODE AS SICISOFFICESCODE, J.SLVL_NM AS SICISOFFICESNM, I.SSUBSCNEALIAS AS SSUBSCNEALIAS, I.SMODELNAME AS SMODELNAME, I.SSUBSCLGIPPORTDESCRIPTION AS SSUBSCLGIPPORTDESCRIPTION, I.SCONNALIAS AS SCONNALIAS, N.SSVC_MGROUP_NM||N.SSVC_MGROUP_NM1 AS SSVC_MGROUP_NM, K.SIPMS_SVC_NM AS SIPMS_SVC_NM, L.SASSIGN_TYPE_NM AS SASSIGN_TYPE_NM, M.SSVC_USE_TYPE_NM AS SSVC_USE_TYPE_NM, I.SLLNUM AS SLLNUM, I.SSAID AS SSAID, I.SCUSTNAME AS SCUSTNAME, A.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD AS SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD FROM MST.TB_IP_HOST_MST A , MST.TB_IP_ASSIGN_MST B , MST.TB_IP_CREATE_TYPE_CD C , MST.TB_SVC_LINE_TYPE_CD D , MST.TB_ASSIGN_LEVEL_CD E , MST.TB_LVL_MST F , MST.TB_LVL_CD G , MST.TB_LVL_CD H , MST.TB_IP_ALLOC_MST I , MST.TB_LVL_CD J , MST.TB_IPMS_SVC_MST K , MST.TB_ASSIGN_TYPE_CD L , MST.TB_SVC_USE_TYPE_CD M , MST.TB_SVC_MGROUP_CD N WHERE 1=1 AND NIP_HOST_MST_SEQ=#{nipHostMstSeq, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ = B.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ AND B.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD = C.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD(+) AND B.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = D.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD(+) AND B.SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD = E.SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD(+) AND B.NLVL_MST_SEQ = F.NLVL_MST_SEQ(+) AND B.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = F.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD(+) AND F.SSVC_GROUP_CD = G.SLVL_CD(+) AND F.SSVC_OBJ_CD = H.SLVL_CD(+) AND B.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ = I.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ(+) AND I.SICISOFFICESCODE = J.SLVL_CD(+) AND B.NIPMS_SVC_SEQ = K.NIPMS_SVC_SEQ(+) AND B.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD = L.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD(+) AND K.SSVC_USE_TYPE_CD = M.SSVC_USE_TYPE_CD(+) AND K.SSVC_HGROUP_CD = N.SSVC_HGROUP_CD AND K.SSVC_MGROUP_CD = N.SSVC_MGROUP_CD LIMIT 1
